entity.summary: Intent-based decentralized trading and liquidity-routing protocol that matches peer-to-peer swap intents and aggregates liquidity across Ethereum venues.
entity.notes: The first-party JavaScript application remains reachable. Current protocol data reports non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day DEX volume and substantial cumulative exchange activity. HEI therefore classifies BarterSwap Superposition as active and retains BarterSwap as the shorter alias.

evidence.title: BarterSwap official application
evidence.notes: The current first-party JavaScript application remains reachable and preserves the BarterSwap trading identity.

evidence.title: BarterSwap Superposition protocol profile
evidence.notes: Current protocol data identifies BarterSwap as an intent-based decentralized trading and liquidity-routing protocol on Ethereum.

evidence.title: BarterSwap Superposition DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: Non-zero current 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day Ethereum DEX volume supports an active classification.
